dict.string: Aitvaras reads new mail from Apple Mail to summarize it and suggest actions. Mail stays unread and no mail is ever sent automatically.
During a capture session Aitvaras transcribes system audio on-device. No audio is ever recorded to disk.
Aitvaras reads your calendar and creates events for you (she only ever modifies events she created herself).
Local-first personal AI. All inference on-device.
Aitvaras listens to you during voice conversations. Audio never leaves this Mac.
Aitvaras reads and creates reminders/todos for you.
Aitvaras transcribes your speech on-device for voice conversations.
